The '''Battle of M2398-3''' was a small battle between [[Wraith Squadron]] and a band of [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] which used the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Blood Nest]] and a local asteroid belt as their headquarters. The battle was won by Wraith Squadron, but [[Jesmin Ackbar]] was killed in a dogfight over the moon.

{{Battle-stub}}
